evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "Select" matches "Context-preserving view switching — Switching views should not feel like a hard reset; the workspace should keep useful context so users do not lose their place. — View switching preserves useful context where possible: selected task, focus state, expanded containers, and stage position.
